  "findings": [
    "Formwork surfaces have not been oiled or treated with a release agent prior to reinforcement placement and concrete pouring."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Apply an approved form release agent to all formwork contact surfaces before placing reinforcement and pouring concrete, ensuring no ponding or runoff onto rebar."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to ACI 347, formwork contact surfaces must be treated with a suitable release agent (form oil) before concrete placement to prevent adhesion, ensure clean stripping, and protect the concrete surface finish. Failing to oil the forms before pouring will result in damage to both the concrete surface and the forms during stripping.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 Guide to Formwork for Concrete"
  ]
}
